zones.label: Gantt runtime shell
zones.allowedChanges: Markers, tokens and scroll-safe wrapper rules only.

zones.label: Gantt toolbar and filters
zones.allowedChanges: ActionButton markers, wrapping tokens and non-mutating control labels.

zones.label: Timeline scale rows
zones.allowedChanges: Tokenized colors and typography; no scale calculation changes.

zones.label: Rows and lane labels
zones.allowedChanges: Typography/tokens and markers; no rowLayout calculation changes.

zones.label: Operation slots
zones.allowedChanges: State classes/tokens/markers; no DOM or drag/resize behavior changes without tests.

zones.label: SVG dependency layer
zones.allowedChanges: Stroke/fill tokens and markers; no path routing or marker geometry changes.

zones.label: Drawer/editor/optimization overlays
zones.allowedChanges: Overlay markers and viewport-fit checks; no form business logic changes.
